title: Crispy Norwegian Pistachios Fritters
description: Herbal, crispy, indulgent vegan fritters made with ground pistachios, chickpea flour, and fresh herbs, served at breakfast or as a snack.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together chickpea flour, baking powder, sea salt, black pepper, and dried dill until well combined.
In a separate bowl, mix almond milk, aquafaba, maple syrup, chopped parsley, and chives, whisking until frothy.
Pour the wet mixture into the dry mixture, stirring gently until a thick, slightly sticky batter forms.
Let the batter rest for 5 minutes to allow the flour to hydrate and the spices to meld.
Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat, aiming for a temperature of about 180 °C (350 °F).
Drop spoonfuls of batter into the hot oil, flattening each fritter slightly with a spatula.
Cook for 2–3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and crisp, turning carefully with a slotted spoon.
Remove fritters to paper towels to drain excess oil, then serve warm, optionally sprinkled with extra fresh herbs or a pinch of sea salt.
